title: Develop a pest management plan
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop a pest management plan demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine goals of the pest management plan

pcs.text: Determine scope of the plan according to project requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine scope of the plan according to project requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine scope of the plan according to project requirements.

pcs.text: Conduct and document consultation with stakeholders to determine goals according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct and document consultation with stakeholders to determine goals according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct and document consultation with stakeholders to determine goals according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Determine realistic time frames for plan implementation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine realistic time frames for plan implementation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine realistic time frames for plan implementation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine goals of the pest management plan

elements.title: Set specific objectives for the pest management plan

pcs.text: Define and document objectives to be achieved in consultation with stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define and document objectives to be achieved in consultation with stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define and document objectives to be achieved in consultation with stakeholders.

pcs.text: Define roles and responsibilities of stakeholders in delivering objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define roles and responsibilities of stakeholders in delivering objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define roles and responsibilities of stakeholders in delivering objectives.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Set specific objectives for the pest management plan

elements.title: Identify activities required to achieve specific objectives relating to the pest management plan

pcs.text: Determine and document activities required to achieve objectives by proposed deadlines in consultation with stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and document activities required to achieve objectives by proposed deadlines in consultation with stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and document activities required to achieve objectives by proposed deadlines in consultation with stakeholders.

pcs.text: Select and schedule activities according to critical control points and workplace activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and schedule activities according to critical control points and workplace activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and schedule activities according to critical control points and workplace activities.

pcs.text: Conduct risk management for community, environment, production and health and safety according to health and safety in the workplace  procedures and biosecurity and environmental regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct risk management for community, environment, production and health and safety according to health and safety in the workplace  procedures and biosecurity and environmental regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct risk management for community, environment, production and health and safety according to health and safety in the workplace  procedures and biosecurity and environmental regulations.

pcs.text: Identify site clean-up requirements according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site clean-up requirements according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site clean-up requirements according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Develop contingency plans for identified risks and external influences according to health and safety in the workplace and biosecurity procedures and regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop contingency plans for identified risks and external influences according to health and safety in the workplace and biosecurity procedures and regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop contingency plans for identified risks and external influences according to health and safety in the workplace and biosecurity procedures and regulations.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine monitoring methods and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine monitoring methods and procedures.

pcs.text: Determine control methods relevant to the plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine control methods relevant to the plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine control methods relevant to the plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Identify activities required to achieve specific objectives relating to the pest management plan

elements.title: Estimate resources required to complete required activities

pcs.text: Determine human and physical resources required for plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine human and physical resources required for plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine human and physical resources required for plan.

pcs.text: Estimate and document cost of resources according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate and document cost of resources according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate and document cost of resources according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Estimate resources required to complete required activities

elements.title: Finalise pest management plan

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prioritise activities in plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prioritise activities in plan.

pcs.text: Document and present plan to stakeholders for approval according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and present plan to stakeholders for approval according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and present plan to stakeholders for approval according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Finalise pest management plan
